prompt: The stream pipeline does not print anything. What is the bug?
choices: Stream.filter() must be called after Stream.map()
Streams are lazy — intermediate operations (filter, map) are not executed until a terminal operation (forEach, collect, count) is called
The lambda inside filter cannot print to stdout
Stream.of() must be called with at least 4 elements
explanation: Streams are lazy. filter() and map() are intermediate operations — they build a pipeline but do not execute. Without a terminal operation, nothing runs. The output is just "done". Fix: add .forEach(System.out::println) or .collect(Collectors.toList()) to trigger execution.
